parameters.perturbation_scope: K-only at specific head x position band

prediction_outcome: Scenario B CONFIRMED (25% confidence). H5 answer routing is position-independent.
key_finding: H5 answer routing position-INDEPENDENT (range=9.3pp, CIs overlap). H7=100% all positions. Head identity explains ~95% of variance. Head and position are orthogonal mechanisms.
evidence_impact: Answers Open Question #20. Adds findings #52-54. Adds to disconfirmed claims (H5 concentrates at late positions).
next_planned: Replicate H5 x position on Llama OR H5 attention pattern analysis OR comprehensive synthesis

null_space_existence.status: CONFIRMED in K-space (p=0.013). Narrow but real. Qwen-specific.

spatial_structure.status: DECISIVELY DISCONFIRMED for selectivity. Positional dissociation confirmed. HEAD-LEVEL CONCENTRATION decisive on Qwen, weak on Llama. Head x position ORTHOGONAL.

positional_dissociation.status: Complete. Head and position orthogonal (Exp 049). Text gradient exists within H5 but accuracy flat.

geometric_dissociation.status: K > V UNIVERSAL at per-head level: 16/16 heads across 2 models. V=456/456 absolute.

head_level_analysis.status: COMPLETE: Two-regime on Qwen (decisive), near-collapse on Llama (disconfirmatory). Head x position orthogonal (Exp 049).

natural_usage.status: H2O/TC protection via position. TC best protection metric.

cross_model_replication.status: COMPLETE: 4 families, 5 variants. Multi-head on 2 models. Head-level redundancy encoding-dependent.

encoding_strategy.status: COMPLETE TAXONOMY + head-level redundancy encoding-dependent confirmed at multi-head level.
